text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists and is real, published at NeurIPS 2024 and on arXiv (2406.20062). The cited authors — Qian Xie, Raul Astudillo, Peter Frazier, Ziv Scully, and Alexander Terenin — exactly match the real authors. The automated checker's "mismatch" report appears to have retrieved a completely different paper's metadata in error.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.20062
